CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GISProximityCheck when a USGS National Hydrography Dataset waterway intersects the project buffer (0.5 miles). Triggers CWA Section 404/401 permitting requirement. NEPA_CE_Screener routes to set nepa_extraordinary_circumstances__c when this flag is active.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: USGS NHD waterway within 0.5 miles of project. CWA Section 404/401 permit may be required. Review ordinary high water mark and scope of fill activities.
CustomField.label: NHD Waterway Proximity Flag
